title: Sizinator
description: A Device That Lets You Change Your Player's and other entity's Sizes
body: This Is A Mod That Allows You To Craft A device Called The Sizinator This Device Allows You To Change Your Player Size And Other Entity's Size's. When You Right Click And Shift With The Device You Will Get a Pop up Menu That Says Lets You Choose Entity Or Player Chossing Player Will Change Your Size Entity Will Change Other Entitys Sizes Then You Will Get Another Menu That Says Multiply OR Divide And Then You Can Right Click And It Will Change Your Size Your Another Entitys Size. You Will Need Pehkui.
